sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 머크는 2026년 1분기 매출 163억 달러를 기록하며 항암제와 동물용 의약품 부문의 성장을 확인했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 전 세계 매출은 163억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 5% 성장했으며, 이는 항암제 및 동물용 의약품 부문의 강세가 견인했습니다.
2026년 연간 매출 가이던스를 658억~670억 달러로, 비GAAP 주당순이익(EPS) 가이던스를 5.04~5.16달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 키트루다(KEYTRUDA) 매출은 80억 달러로 12% 성장했으며, 윈레베어(WINREVAIR)는 5억 2,500만 달러로 88%의 높은 성장세를 보였습니다.
HIV 치료제 IDVYNSO의 FDA 승인을 획득하고, Terns Pharmaceuticals 인수를 통해 혈액암 파이프라인을 확장했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 순손실은 주로 Cidara Therapeutics 인수 관련 비용(주당 3.62달러) 발생에 기인합니다.
동물용 의약품 부문 매출은 18억 달러로 전년 대비 13% 성장했습니다.

watchItems.text: 5월 완료 예정인 Terns Pharmaceuticals 인수 이후의 통합 시너지와 파이프라인 개발 속도를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.
향후 임상 3상 데이터 발표가 예정된 파이프라인의 성과가 연간 가이던스 달성에 미칠 영향을 주시해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2612241d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 News Release Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, N.J., USA Announces First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results; Highlights Significant Regulatory Approvals and Clinical Milestones Sales Growth Driven by Continued Strength in Oncology and Animal Health, Plus Increasing Contributions From Launches - Total Worldwide Sales Were $16.3 Billion (5% Growth; 3% Growth ex-FX) o KEYTRUDA/KEYTRUDA QLEX 1 Sales Were $8.0 Billion (12% Growth; 8% Growth ex-FX); Includes KEYTRUDA QLEX Sales of $128 Million o WINREVAIR Sales Were $525 Million (88% Growth; 87% Growth ex-FX) o Animal Health Sales Were $1.8 Billion (13% Growth; 6% Growth ex-FX) - GAAP Loss per Share Was $1.72; Non-GAAP Loss per Share Was  Normalized numeric aliases: $16.3 Billion = 163억 달러; $8.0 Billion = 80억 달러; $128 Million = 1억 2,800만 달러; $525 Million = 5억 2,500만 달러; $1.8 Billion = 18억 달러; $16.3 = 16.3달러; $8.0 = 8.0달러; $128 = 128달러; $525 = 525달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $1.72 = 1.72달러; $1.28 = 1.28달러.

ACC.26, Including Positive Results From Phase 3 CORALreef AddOn Trial - Received U.S. FDA Approval for IDVYNSO, a Once-Daily, Oral Treatment for Certain Adults With Virologically Suppressed HIV-1 - Achieved Multiple Significant Regulatory and Clinical Milestones Across Oncology Pipeline - Announced Agreement To Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Expand Hematology Pipeline With TERN-701, a Novel Candidate for Chronic Myeloid Leukemia; Transaction Expected To Close in May - Full-Year 2026 Financial Outlook o Narrows and Raises the Midpoint of Worldwide Sales Range; Now Expects Sales To Be Between $65.8 Billion and $67.0 Billion o Narrows and Raises Expected Non-GAAP EPS Range To Be Between $5.04 and $5.16 o Outlook Does Not Reflect Any Impact From Proposed Acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Which Is Expected To Close in May  Normalized numeric aliases: $65.8 Billion = 658억 달러; $67.0 Billion = 670억 달러; $65.8 = 65.8달러; $67.0 = 67.0달러; $5.04 = 5.04달러; $5.16 = 5.16달러; $5 = 5달러.

8 Billion or Approximately $2.35 per Share RAHWAY, N.J., April 30, 2026 – Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, N.J., USA (NYSE: MRK), known as MSD outside the United States and Canada, today announced financial results for the first quarter of 2026. 1 Available in some markets as KEYTRUDA SC. - 2 - “We are moving with speed to transform our portfolio to one with a diversified set of growth drivers across a broad set of therapeutic areas,” said Robert M. Davis, chairman and chief executive officer. “During the first quarter, we continued to strengthen our pipeline with science-led business development, including our planned acquisition of Terns. We also achieved several important milestones, such as the FDA approval of IDVYNSO – which marks a new chapter in our longstanding commitment to people living with HIV. I am pleased with our progress and excited for what’s ahead, as we enter a particularly  Normalized numeric aliases: 8 Billion = 80억 달러; $2.35 = 2.35달러.

robust period of Phase 3 data readouts and deliver on the promise of our pipeline for patients.” Financial Summary First Quarter $ in millions, except EPS amounts 2026 2025 Change Change Ex- Exchange Sales $ 16,286 $ 15,529 5 % 3 % GAAP net (loss) income 2 (4,240 ) 5,079 N/M N/M Non-GAAP net (loss) income that excludes certain items notes 2 and 3* (3,156 ) 5,611 N/M N/M GAAP EPS (1.72 ) 2.01 N/M N/M Non-GAAP EPS that excludes certain items 3* (1.28 ) 2.22 N/M N/M *Refer to table on page 7. N/M - Not meaningful. For the first quarter of 2026, Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) loss / earnings per share (EPS) assuming dilution was a loss per share of $1.72 and non-GAAP loss per share was $1.28. Both the GAAP and non-GAAP loss per share were due to a charge for the acquisition of Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Cidara) of $3.62 per share. Non-GAAP EPS excludes acquisition- and dives  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.72 = 1.72달러; $1.28 = 1.28달러; $3.62 = 3.62달러.
